name: Orange-Banana Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift together the flour, baking powder, and salt.
2. Stir in chopped nuts, candied fruits, and raisins.
3. Cream the shortening, then add sugar, beating until light and fluffy.
4. Add eggs one at a time, beating after each addition.
5. Combine mashed banana and orange juice; add to creamed mixture alternately with the flour mixture, beginning and ending with the dry ingredients.
6. Turn batter into a greased, wax-paper-lined 9x5x3 loaf pan.
7. Bake at 350°F for 1 1/4 hours.
8. Cool for 20-30 minutes before turning out onto a cake rack. Makes 1 loaf.
